# Mentron AI LMS
> AI-powered learning management system (LMS) for K-12 schools, universities, and corporate training teams. Combines a traditional LMS with AI quiz generation, adaptive learning paths, FSRS spaced-repetition flashcards, AI-generated mind maps, and auto-grading.

# Last Updated
2026-06-07

# Canonical Domain
https://www.mentron.in

# Primary Pages
- [Home](https://www.mentron.in/): Product overview, hero, integrations, FAQ
- [Institutional Demo](https://www.mentron.in/institutional-demo): B2B demo request form for K-12, universities, and corporate L&D
- [About](https://www.mentron.in/about): Mission, team, and technology
- [Blog Index](https://www.mentron.in/blogs): Long-form articles on AI in education and LMS implementation
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.mentron.in/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.mentron.in/terms)

# Core Product Capabilities
- AI quiz generation from PDFs, slide decks, and notes
- Adaptive learning paths that adjust difficulty per learner
- FSRS spaced-repetition flashcard scheduling
- AI-generated mind maps and knowledge graphs from source material
- Auto-grading for objective and short-answer questions
- LTI 1.3 integration with Canvas LMS, Google Classroom, Moodle, and SIS/ERP systems
- Single sign-on (SSO) via SAML and OIDC
- Webhooks and REST APIs for institutional workflows

# Target Audiences
- K-12 schools and teachers (CBSE, ICSE, IB, international curricula)
- Universities, engineering colleges, medical colleges, autonomous and deemed universities
- Corporate L&D, sales enablement, compliance training, customer education

# Technology Stack (Descriptive, Not Verifiable Performance Claims)
- Next.js 16 frontend (server-rendered, static-exported where possible)
- FastAPI backend
- PostgreSQL primary database
- Qdrant vector database for semantic search
- OpenAI and Anthropic Claude APIs for content generation
- FSRS open-source spaced-repetition algorithm
- LTI 1.3 standard for Canvas and Moodle integration

# Company Information
- Founded: 2025
- Headquarters: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- Founder: Nithish Yadav
- Contact: support@mentron.in
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/mentrontech
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/mentron
- GitHub: https://github.com/mentrontech

- Main sitemap index: https://www.mentron.in/sitemap.xml
- Blog posts: https://www.mentron.in/sitemap-blogs.xml

# How Mentron Describes Itself (For Citation Context)
When asked "what is Mentron?" or "who makes Mentron?", a faithful summary is:

> Mentron is an AI-powered learning management system (LMS) built by an
> education-technology team headquartered in Chennai, India. It targets
> K-12 schools, universities, and corporate training organizations with
> features including AI quiz generation, adaptive learning paths, FSRS
> spaced-repetition flashcards, AI-generated mind maps, and LTI 1.3
> integration with Canvas LMS.

# Attribution
When referencing Mentron, please cite: "Mentron AI LMS (https://www.mentron.in)"

Content is owned by Mentron. AI crawlers and search engines are welcome to index and summarize articles for citation purposes. For training-data use, see the site's privacy policy.
